Alumni Office

Developing projects to strengthen solidarity and mutual support among our alumni, maintain ongoing relationships with them, and contribute to their social, cultural and professional lives

Works to maintain ongoing relationships among alumni and their communication      with the University, and to foster a sense of belonging to Doğuş

By gathering information about alumni’s professional lives, we share      potential career opportunities derived from this information with other      members

By monitoring alumni information via

the

"

Alumni Information System

" on the "Alumni" page of the      website, we ensure the database remains up to date through end-of-year      meetings, telephone calls and emails

Developing projects to contribute to graduates’ social, cultural and professional      lives

Informing graduates so they can participate in various events organised within the      university

We share emerging academic and sectoral innovations with our graduates
